productDisplayName: Reebok Men Sprintfit Lite Black Sports Shoe
description: Get ready to score goals in style with the Sprintfit Like LP football shoe from reebok. With a clean, snug design in a stylish silhouette, this sneaker offers superior traction and allows for better performance on the field.UpperSynthetic upper for lightweight comfort and water resistanceLace-ups for a snug FitCushioned collar and tongue for greater comfortLogo on the sides, tongue and behind the collar for stylePadded foam sockliner for greater comfort and cushioningMidsoleCushioned midsole for lightweight comfortOutsoleOutsole with TPR studs for excellent traction on hard and natural surfacesShoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
